subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath described His Own Self as the First and the Last, the Manifest and the Hidden, and Who is cognizant of all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی وصف نفسه بانه هو الاول و الاخر و الظاهر و الباطن و هو بکلشیء
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @wisdom [hikmat], @order; organization; tact; deliberation [tadbir]
